name: XIO
description: XIO is a non-custodial trading and automation interface for on-chain markets. It provides a single dashboard to track positions, PnL and risk, and to execute trades across supported venues such as perpetual futures and outcome markets. Users keep funds in a smart account and can authorize software agents to run predefined actions using scoped permissions (e.g., max notional, daily spend limits, or allowed markets). XIO generates protocol revenue from supported trading and routing fees, with a portion allocated to token buybacks and burns.
